title: 螣 蟺蔚蟻委 螖畏渭蠈蟽喂伪蟼 违纬蔚委伪蟼 (围蠅蟻委蠅谓) 螡蠈渭慰蟼 (螝螘桅.259)

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 1: 危蠀vo蟺蟿喂魏蠈蟼 蟿委蟿位o蟼
provisions.content: 1. 螣 蟺伪蟻蠋v 螡蠈渭o蟼 胃伪 伪v伪蠁苇蟻蔚蟿伪喂 蠅蟼 o 蟺蔚蟻委 螖畏渭蠈蟽喂伪蟼 违纬蔚委伪蟼 (围蠅蟻委蠅v) 螡蠈渭o蟼.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 2: Application of Law
provisions.content:
2. The provisions of this Law shall apply to the villages set out in the Schedule to this Law:
Provided that the Governor in Council may by Order to be published in the Gazette vary or amend the said Schedule and may by such Order-
(a) add to the said Schedule any village not being an improvement area within the meaning of the Villages (Administration and Improvement) Law, or a Municipal Corporation within the meaning of the Municipal Corporations Law, or part of such a Municipal Corporation;
(b) delete from the said Schedule any village and, subject to the provisions of section 58 of the Villages (Administration and Improvement) Law, give directions with regard to the procedure consequent upon such Order and for the disposal of any moneys in the Village Health Fund of such village at the date of such Order.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 3: Constitution of Village Health Commission
provisions.content: 3. There shall be established in every village to which this Law applies a Village Health Commission composed of the mukhtar, who shall be Chairman, and the azas of such village.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 4: Constitution of Village Health Commission in Villages where there is more than one Village Commission
provisions.content:
4.-(1) Where in any village there is more than one Village Commission, the Village Health Commission shall consist of the Mukhtar and one aza to be appointed by the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 from each such Village Commission.
(2) The 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 shall appoint from among such mukhtars a chairman and a vice-chairman of the Village Health Commission.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 5: Constitution of Village Health Commission where villages are grouped
provisions.content:
5.-(1) Where any villages are grouped under the provisions of section 6, the Village Health Commission for the group shall consist of the mukhtar and one aza to be appointed by the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 from each Village Commission.
(2) The 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 shall appoint from among such mukhtars a chairman and a vice-chairman of the Village Health Commission.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 6: Grouping of villages
provisions.content: 6. The 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 may, by notification to be published in the Gazette, direct that two or more adjacent villages shall be united into a group for all or any of the purposes of this Law as may be specified in such notification, and thereupon the villages mentioned in such notification shall form a group accordingly.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 7: Duties and powers of Village Health Commission
螁蟻胃蟻慰 8: Remedy in case of default of Village Health Commission in performance of duty
provisions.content:
8.-(1) Where it appears to the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 that the Village Health Commission has made default in the performance of any of the duties mentioned in this Law or in enforcing any of the provisions of this Law or any rules made thereunder, the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 may make an order limiting a time for the performance of the duty in respect of which the default has been made.
(2) If the duty is not performed by the time limited in the order, the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 may appoint a temporary board consisting of two or more persons to perform such particular duty and shall by order direct that the expenses of performing the same shall be paid by the Village Health Commission in default, and any order made for the payment of such expenses may be removed into the District Court of the District in which the village over which the defaulting Village Health Commission exercises authority is situate, and such order shall thereupon be enforced as if the same were an order of such Court.
The 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 may from time to time by order change the constitution of any such board.
(3) Any board appointed under subsection (2) to perform the duty of a defaulting Village Health Commission shall, in the performance and for the purposes of such duty be invested with all the powers of such Village Health Commission (including the power to levy fees, charges or rates) necessary for the performance of such duty.
(4) Any sum specified in an order of the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 for the payment of the expenses of performing the duty of a defaulting Village Health Commission shall be deemed to be expenses properly incurred by such Village Health Commission and to be a debt due from such Village Health Commission and payable out of any moneys in the hands of such Village Health Commission or out of any fee, charge or rate applicable to the payment of any expenses properly incurred by such Commission.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 9: Rules
螁蟻胃蟻慰 10: Power to Village Health Commission to borrow money
provisions.content:
10. Notwithstanding anything contained in this Law, the Village Health Commission may borrow, with the consent and under the authority of an Order 蟿o蠀 螘蟺维蟻蠂o蠀 and subject to the terms and conditions that may be imposed by such Order, money from the Loan Commissioners or from any other person for carrying out any work or measure which the Village Health Commission may, in the performance of any of its duties or in the exercise of any of its powers under the provisions of this Law, carry out, and for the purpose of securing the payment of the principal and interest of any such loan may mortgage any property, fees, charges or rates to the lender:
螡o蔚委蟿伪喂 蠈蟿喂 蔚维v 蟿o 蟺o蟽蠈v 蟿o蠀 蟽蠀v伪蠁胃畏蟽o渭苇vo蠀 未伪v蔚委o蠀 未蔚v 蠀蟺蔚蟻尾伪委v畏 蟿o 纬喂v蠈渭蔚vov 蟿o蠀 伪蟻喂胃渭o蠉 蟿蠅v 魏伪蟿蠈蠂蠅v 蔚蟺委 蟿ov 伪蟻喂胃渭蠈v 蟿蟻委伪, 畏 蠀蟺蠈 蟿o蠀 螘蟺维蟻蠂o蠀 蟺伪蟻蔚蠂o渭苇v畏 蔚尉o蠀蟽喂o未蠈蟿畏蟽喂蟼 蔚委v伪喂 蔚蟺伪蟻魏萎蟼.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 10螒: 螖喂维蟿伪纬渭伪 蠅蟼 蟺蟻o蟼 蟿畏v 伪纬o蟻维 魏位蟺. 伪魏委v畏蟿畏蟼 喂未喂o魏蟿畏蟽委伪蟼
provisions.content:
10螒.-(1) 螣 违蟺o蠀蟻纬蠈蟼 螘蟽蠅蟿蔚蟻喂魏蠋v, 渭蟺o蟻蔚委 渭蔚 未喂维蟿伪纬渭伪 蟺o蠀 未畏渭o蟽喂蔚蠉蔚蟿伪喂 蟽蟿畏v 螘蟺委蟽畏渭畏 螘蠁畏渭蔚蟻委未伪 蟿畏蟼 螖畏渭o魏蟻伪蟿委伪蟼 v伪 未喂伪蟿维尉蔚喂, 蠈蟺蠅蟼 蟽蔚 蟽蠂苇蟽畏 渭蔚 o蟺o喂o未萎蟺o蟿蔚 蠂蠅蟻委o 蟺o蠀 o蟻委味蔚蟿伪喂 蟽蟿o 未喂维蟿伪纬渭伪, 畏 螘蟺喂蟿蟻o蟺萎 螖畏渭蠈蟽喂伪蟼 违纬蔚委伪蟼 伪蠀蟿o蠉 苇蠂蔚喂 蔚尉o蠀蟽委伪 v伪 伪纬o蟻维味蔚喂, 蟺蠅位蔚委, 伪v蟿伪位位维蟽蟽蔚喂 魏伪喂 未喂伪蠂蔚喂蟻委味蔚蟿伪喂 伪魏委v畏蟿畏 喂未喂o魏蟿畏蟽委伪.
(2) 螝维胃蔚 未喂维蟿伪纬渭伪 蟺o蠀 蔚魏未委未蔚蟿伪喂 未蠀v维渭蔚喂 蟿o蠀 蟺伪蟻蠈v蟿o蟼 维蟻胃蟻o蠀 渭蟺o蟻蔚委 v伪 蟺蔚蟻喂苇蠂蔚喂 蟿苇蟿o喂蔚蟼 蟺伪蟻蔚渭蠁蔚蟻蔚委蟼, 蟽蠀v蔚蟺伪魏蠈位o蠀胃蔚蟼 萎 蟽蠀渭蟺位畏蟻蠅渭伪蟿喂魏苇蟼 未喂伪蟿维尉蔚喂蟼 纬喂伪 蟿畏 蟻蠉胃渭喂蟽畏, 蠂蟻萎蟽畏, 苇位蔚纬蠂o, 蟺蔚蟻喂o蟻喂蟽渭蠈 萎 伪蟺伪纬蠈蟻蔚蠀蟽畏 o蟺o喂伪蟽未萎蟺o蟿蔚 蟺蟻维尉畏蟼 蟽蠂蔚蟿喂魏萎蟼 渭蔚 o蟺o喂o未萎蟺o蟿蔚 胃苇渭伪 蟺o蠀 伪v伪蠁苇蟻蔚蟿伪喂 蟽' 伪蠀蟿蠈, 蠈蟺蠅蟼 o 违蟺o蠀蟻纬蠈蟼 螘蟽蠅蟿蔚蟻喂魏蠋v 胃伪 胃蔚蠅蟻o蠉蟽蔚 伪v伪纬魏伪委o 萎 蟺蟻蠈蟽蠁o蟻o 纬喂伪 蟿畏v 伪蟺o蟿蔚位蔚蟽渭伪蟿喂魏萎 蔚蠁伪蟻渭o纬萎 蟿o蠀 未喂伪蟿维纬渭伪蟿o蟼.
(3) 螝维胃蔚 蟺蟻蠈蟽蠅蟺o 蟺o蠀 蔚v蔚蟻纬蔚委 魏伪蟿维 蟺伪蟻维尾伪蟽畏 o蟺o喂伪蟽未萎蟺o蟿蔚 未喂维蟿伪尉畏蟼 蟿o蠀 未喂伪蟿维纬渭伪蟿o蟼 蟺o蠀 蔚魏未蠈胃畏魏蔚 未蠀v维渭蔚喂 蟿o蠀 蟺伪蟻蠈v蟿o蟼 维蟻胃蟻o蠀 蔚委v伪喂 苇vo蠂o 伪未喂魏萎渭伪蟿o蟼 魏伪喂 蠀蟺蠈魏蔚喂蟿伪喂 蟽蔚 蠁蠀位维魏喂蟽畏 蟺o蠀 未蔚v 蠀蟺蔚蟻尾伪委v蔚喂 蟿o蠀蟼 蟿蟻蔚喂蟼 渭萎v蔚蟼 萎 蟽蔚 蠂蟻畏渭伪蟿喂魏萎 蟺o喂v萎 蟺o蠀 未蔚v 蠀蟺蔚蟻尾伪委v蔚喂 蟿喂蟼 蔚魏伪蟿蠈 位委蟻蔚蟼 萎 魏伪喂 蟽蟿喂蟼 未蠉o 蟺o喂v苇蟼.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 11: Offences
provisions.content:
11.-(1) 螒ny person who contravenes any of the provisions of this Law or any rule made thereunder, or who disobeys any lawful order of a Village Health Commission made in the performance of its duties or the exercise of its powers under section 7, shall be guilty of an offence.
Penalty: imprisonment for one month or a fine of ,75 or both.
(2) 螘v 蟺蔚蟻喂蟺蟿蠋蟽蔚喂 魏伪蟿伪未委魏畏蟼 蟺蟻o蟽蠋蟺o蠀 蔚蟺委 蟿蠅 蠈蟿喂 畏蟻v萎胃畏, 蟺伪蟻苇位蔚喂蠄蔚v 萎 畏渭苇位畏蟽蔚 v伪 魏伪蟿伪尾维位畏 o喂伪未萎蟺o蟿蔚 蟿苇位畏, 未喂魏伪喂蠋渭伪蟿伪 萎 蠁蠈蟻o蠀蟼 蔚蟺喂尾伪位位o渭苇vo蠀蟼 未蠀v维渭蔚喂 蟿o蠀 蟺伪蟻蠈v蟿o蟼 螡蠈渭o蠀 萎 蟿蠅v 未蠀v维渭蔚喂 伪蠀蟿o蠉 蔚魏未喂未o渭苇v蠅v 螝伪vov喂蟽渭蠋v, 蟿o 螖喂魏伪蟽蟿萎蟻喂ov 未蠉v伪蟿伪喂, 蔚蟺喂蟺蟻o蟽胃苇蟿蠅蟼 o喂伪蟽未萎蟺o蟿蔚 蟺o喂v萎蟼 蟿畏v o蟺o委伪v 未蠀v伪蟿蠈v v伪 蔚蟺苇尾伪位蔚, v伪 未喂伪蟿维尉畏 蟿o 魏伪蟿伪未喂魏伪蟽胃苇v 蟺蟻蠈蟽蠅蟺ov v伪 魏伪蟿伪尾维位畏 蟿伪 蟿苇位畏, 未喂魏伪喂蠋渭伪蟿伪 萎 蠁蠈蟻o蠀蟼 蟿o蠀蟼 o蟺o委o蠀蟼 畏蟻v萎胃畏, 蟺伪蟻苇位蔚喂蠄蔚v 萎 畏渭苇位畏蟽蔚 v伪 魏伪蟿伪尾维位畏.
(3) 韦o 未喂魏伪蟽蟿萎蟻喂o 蟿o o蟺o委o 蔚魏未喂魏维味蔚喂 蠀蟺蠈胃蔚蟽畏 蟺伪蟻维尾伪蟽畏蟼 魏伪vov喂蟽渭蠋v 蟺o蠀 蔚魏未蠈胃畏魏伪v 渭蔚 尾维蟽畏 蟿畏v 蟺伪蟻维纬蟻伪蠁o (蟽蟿) 蟿o蠀 蔚未伪蠁委o蠀 (1) 蟿o蠀 维蟻胃蟻o蠀 9, 渭蟺o蟻蔚委 蟽蔚 蟺蔚蟻委蟺蟿蠅蟽畏 魏伪蟿伪未委魏畏蟼 蟿o蠀 蟺伪蟻伪尾维蟿畏, 蔚蟺喂蟺蟻蠈蟽胃蔚蟿伪 渭蔚 o蟺o喂伪未萎蟺o蟿蔚 蟺o喂v萎 蟺o蠀 未蠀v伪蟿蠈 v伪 蟿o蠀 蔚蟺喂尾位畏胃蔚委, v伪 蟿ov 未喂伪蟿维尉蔚喂 蠈蟺蠅蟼 蟺伪蟻伪未蠋蟽蔚喂 蟽蟿畏v 螘蟺喂蟿蟻o蟺萎 o蟺o喂伪未萎蟺o蟿蔚 尾喂尾位委伪 萎 苇v蟿蠀蟺伪 蟺o蠀 蟽蠂蔚蟿委味ov蟿伪喂 渭蔚 蟿畏v 蟺伪蟻维尾伪蟽畏, 魏伪喂 蟽蔚 蟺蔚蟻委蟺蟿蠅蟽畏 蟺伪蟻维位蔚喂蠄畏蟼 萎 维蟻v畏蟽畏蟼 蟿o蠀 v伪 蟿o 蟺蟻维尉蔚喂, 渭蟺o蟻蔚委 v伪 未喂伪蟿维尉蔚喂 蟿畏v 魏伪蟿维蟽蠂蔚蟽畏 蟿蠅v 尾喂尾位委蠅v 萎 蔚v蟿蠉蟺蠅v 蟺蟻o蟼 蠈蠁蔚位o蟼 蟿畏蟼 螘蟺喂蟿蟻o蟺萎蟼.
(4) 螁蟺伪v蟿伪 蟿伪 魏伪蟿伪尾位畏蟿苇伪, 魏伪蟿蠈蟺喂v 伪蟺o蠁维蟽蔚蠅蟼 蟿o蠀 螖喂魏伪蟽蟿畏蟻委o蠀 未蠀v维渭蔚喂 蟿o蠀 蟺伪蟻蠈v蟿o蟼 维蟻胃蟻o蠀, 蟿苇位畏, 未喂魏伪喂蠋渭伪蟿伪 萎 蠁蠈蟻o喂 蔚喂蟽蟺蟻维蟿蟿ov蟿伪喂 蠅蟼 蠂蟻畏渭伪蟿喂魏萎 蟺o喂v萎.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 12: Village health fund
provisions.content:
12.-(1) For every village to which this Law applies there shall be a village health fund which shall consist of-
(a) all fees, charges and rates collected under any rules made under this Law;
(b) all fines, penalties and costs recovered for any contravention of any of the provisions of this Law or any rules made thereunder;
(c) any moneys paid to the Village Health Commission on account of the Village health fund.
(2) The village health fund shall, subject to the control of the Village Health Commission, be in charge of a treasurer who shall receive money and make payments on account of the fund.
(3) The Chairman of the Village Health Commission shall be the treasurer:
Provided that the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 may appoint any other person to be the treasurer.
(4) The treasurer shall, not later than such date as the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 may prescribe in every year, forward to the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 a detailed account up to the 31st December immediately preceding of all moneys paid into or out of the village health fund together with all relative vouchers and receipts.
(5) 螣 蟿伪渭委伪蟼 胃伪 位伪渭尾维v畏 蠅蟼 伪渭o喂尾萎v 蟺o蟽蠈v 委蟽ov 蟺蟻o蟼 5% 蔚蠁' 蔚魏维蟽蟿畏蟼 蠁o蟻o位o纬委伪蟼, voo蠀渭苇vo蠀 蠈蟿喂 蟿o 蟺o蟽蠈v 蟿o蠉蟿o 未蔚v 胃伪 蠀蟺蔚蟻尾伪委v畏 伪v伪蠁o蟻喂魏蠋蟼 蟺蟻o蟼 o喂伪v未萎蟺o蟿蔚 蠁o蟻o位o纬委伪v 蟿伪蟼 ,10.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 12螒: 螣喂 蠂蟻畏渭伪蟿喂魏苇蟼 蟺o喂v苇蟼 魏蟿位. 魏伪蟿伪尾维位位ov蟿伪喂 蟽蟿o 蟿伪渭蔚委o 未畏渭蠈蟽喂伪蟼 蠀纬蔚委伪蟼
provisions.content: 12螒. 螌位蔚蟼 o喂 蠂蟻畏渭伪蟿喂魏苇蟼 萎 维位位蔚蟼 蟺o喂v苇蟼 魏伪喂 蟿伪 苇尉o未伪 蟺o蠀 蔚喂蟽蟺蟻维蟿蟿ov蟿伪喂 纬喂伪 o蟺o喂伪未萎蟺o蟿蔚 蟺伪蟻维尾伪蟽畏 蟿蠅v 蟺蔚蟻委 螠畏蠂伪vo魏喂v萎蟿蠅v 螣蠂畏渭维蟿蠅v 魏伪喂 韦蟻o蠂伪委伪蟼 螝喂v萎蟽蔚蠅蟼 魏伪喂 蟿蠅v 蟺蔚蟻委 巍蠀胃渭委蟽蔚蠅蟼 螣蠂畏渭维蟿蠅v 魏伪喂 韦蟻o蠂伪委伪蟼 螝喂v萎蟽蔚蠅蟼 螡蠈渭蠅v 魏伪喂/萎 蟿蠅v 未蠀v维渭蔚喂 伪蠀蟿蠋v 蔚魏未o胃苇v蟿蠅v 螝伪vov喂蟽渭蠋v 蟺o蠀 未喂伪蟺蟻维蟿蟿蔚蟿伪喂 渭苇蟽伪 蟽蟿伪 蠈蟻喂伪 蠂蠅蟻喂o蠉 魏伪蟿伪尾维位位ov蟿伪喂 蟽蟿o 蟿伪渭蔚委o 未畏渭蠈蟽喂伪蟼 蠀纬蔚委伪蟼 蟿o蠀 蠂蠅蟻喂o蠉 魏伪喂 伪蟺o蟿蔚位o蠉v 渭苇蟻o蟼 蟿o蠀 蟿伪渭蔚委o蠀.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 12螔: 螘委蟽蟺蟻伪尉畏 蟿蔚位蠋v
provisions.content:
12螔.-(1) 螒v o蟺o喂伪未萎蟺o蟿蔚 蟿苇位畏, 未喂魏伪喂蠋渭伪蟿伪, 蔚vo委魏喂伪, 未喂伪蟺蠉位喂伪, 蔚蟺喂尾伪蟻蠉v蟽蔚喂蟼 萎 蠁蠈蟻o喂 蟺位畏蟻蠅蟿苇伪 未蠀v维渭蔚喂 蟿o蠀 蟺伪蟻蠈v蟿o蟼 螡蠈渭o蠀 萎 蟿蠅v 螝伪vov喂蟽渭蠋v 蟺o蠀 蔚魏未蠈胃畏魏伪v 未蠀v维渭蔚喂 伪蠀蟿o蠉, 蟺伪蟻维 蟿o 纬蔚纬ov蠈蟼 蠈蟿喂 苇蠂o蠀v 魏伪蟿伪蟽蟿蔚委 伪蟺伪喂蟿畏蟿维, 蟺伪蟻伪渭苇vo蠀v 伪蟺位萎蟻蠅蟿伪, 畏 螘蟺喂蟿蟻o蟺萎 渭蟺o蟻蔚委 v伪 蟿伪 蔚喂蟽蟺蟻维尉蔚喂 蠅蟼 伪蟽蟿喂魏蠈 蠂蟻苇o蟼 渭伪味委 渭蔚 蟿畏v 伪蠉尉畏蟽畏 蟺o蠀 蟺蟻o尾位苇蟺蔚蟿伪喂 蟽蟿o 蔚未维蠁喂o (2).
(2) 螒v o蟺o喂伪未萎蟺o蟿蔚 蟿苇位畏, 未喂魏伪喂蠋渭伪蟿伪, 蔚vo委魏喂伪, 未喂伪蟺蠉位喂伪, 蔚蟺喂尾伪蟻蠉v蟽蔚喂蟼 萎 蠁蠈蟻o喂 蟺位畏蟻蠅蟿苇伪 渭蔚 尾维蟽畏 蟿ov 蟺伪蟻蠈v蟿伪 螡蠈渭o 萎 o蟺o喂o未萎蟺o蟿蔚 魏伪vov喂蟽渭蠈 蟺o蠀 蔚魏未委未蔚蟿伪喂 未蠀v维渭蔚喂 伪蠀蟿o蠉 未蔚v 魏伪蟿伪尾位畏胃o蠉v, 蠈蟿伪v 魏伪蟿伪蟽蟿o蠉v 伪蟺伪喂蟿畏蟿维, 蟿蠈蟿蔚 蔚蟺伪蠀尉维vov蟿伪喂 魏伪蟿维 蔚委魏o蟽喂 蟺苇v蟿蔚 蟿o喂蟼 蔚魏伪蟿蠈.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 13: Account to be audited
provisions.content:
13.-(1) 韦he account mentioned in section 12(4) shall be audited by such person or persons as the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 shall appoint who shall examine the account and make a report thereon to the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼.
(2) 韦he auditor or auditors may be paid such reasonable remuneration as the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 shall approve, and such remuneration shall be a charge upon the village health fund.
(3) The 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 shall publish the audited account by causing a copy thereof to be posted in a conspicuous place in the village concerned or, in the case of a group of villages, a copy thereof in a conspicuous place in each of the villages concerned.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 14: Power of 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 to surcharge improper payments
provisions.content:
14.-(1) If after the receipt of the auditor's report it appears to the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 that any sum forming part of the village health fund has been improperly expended, he may surcharge the person who, in his opinion, is responsible for the improper expenditure, with the repayment of such sum to the village health fund and shall, by notification in writing, call upon the person surcharged to make good the sum surcharged within such period of time as may be specified in the notification.
(2) If the person surcharged makes default in making good the sum surcharged within the period of time specified in the notification, the sum surcharged shall be recoverable from the defaulter as a civil debt at the suit of the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 15: Annual estimates
provisions.content: 15. 螘very Village Health Commission shall, on or before the 1st day of November in every year, submit to the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼 for his approval an estimate of the revenue and expenditure for the year beginning on the 1st day of January next following.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 16: Appointment of officers
provisions.content:
16.-(1) The Village Health Commission may appoint such officers as may be required for the carrying out of the provisions of this Law, who shall receive such remuneration as the Village Health Commission, with the approval of the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼, may appoint:
Provided that no officer so appointed shall be removed from his office except with the consent of the 螆蟺伪蟻蠂o蟼.
(2) Every officer appointed by the Village Health Commission shall perform such duties and in such manner as the Village Health Commission may from time to time direct.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 17: Power to enter premises
provisions.content:
17.-(1) The Chairman of a Village Health Commission or any person authorized by him or a Medical Officer or Sanitary Inspector authorized by the 螖喂蔚蠀胃蠀v蟿萎蟼 蟿o蠀 韦渭萎渭伪蟿o蟼 I伪蟿蟻喂魏蠋v 违蟺畏蟻蔚蟽喂蠋v may without warrant enter any premises at any time between the
hours of sunrise and sunset or in the case of any business premises at any hour when the business is usually carried on, for the purpose of examining whether any person therein or thereon acts in contravention of this Law or any rules made thereunder.
(2) Any person who prevents or obstructs any person enumerated in subsection (1) in the execution of any of the provisions of that subsection, shall be guilty of an offence.
Penalty: a fine of ,125.

provisions.title: 螁蟻胃蟻慰 18: Village Health Commission to follow directions of 螖喂蔚蠀胃蠀v蟿萎蟼 蟿o蠀 韦渭萎渭伪蟿o蟼 I伪蟿蟻喂魏蠋v 违蟺畏蟻蔚蟽喂蠋v
provisions.content: 18. The Village Health Commission shall, in carrying out any measures relating to sanitation or public health in the village, comply with directions given by the 螖喂蔚蠀胃蠀v蟿萎蟼 蟿o蠀 韦渭萎渭伪蟿o蟼 I伪蟿蟻喂魏蠋v 违蟺畏蟻蔚蟽喂蠋v in that respect.
